testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.SpeculationEngineTest

testcase.name: validate with different output returns MISS
speculate returns empty when confidence below threshold
speculate returns predicted output when confidence above threshold
validate without prior speculation returns NO_SPECULATION
validate with matching output returns HIT
hit and miss counters track correctly
